# Medicine Support Hub

Website: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/
Creator: Mina Samy Tawfik Saad
Contact: jesussavedmina@gmail.com | +201284590503
Personal site: https://minasami.github.io/

## Summary

Medicine Support Hub is an AI-ready digital health platform for chronic medicines support programs. It supports patient medicine requests, clinical review, pharmacy fulfillment, NGO beneficiary management, budgeting, procurement, suppliers, donors, partner pharmacies, and public-health impact reporting.

## Vision

To make chronic medicine access more intelligent, transparent, sustainable, and measurable for patients, NGOs, pharmacies, pharmaceutical companies, donors, and healthcare organizations.

## Mission

To provide one unified platform for managing medicine assistance programs from beneficiary enrollment through clinical review, cost control, procurement, delivery, and impact assessment.

## Main modules

- Patient/requester portal
- Staff/admin dashboard
- Clinical reviewer portal
- Pharmacy and fulfillment workflows
- NGO chronic medicine support portal
- Organization and partner management
- Budgeting and procurement planning
- Public-health impact reporting

## Keywords

chronic medicines, medicine support, patient assistance program, NGO healthcare software, public health, pharmacy management, pharmaceutical partnerships, digital health, medicine procurement, DALY, healthcare AI.

## Recommended citation

Medicine Support Hub, created by Mina Samy Tawfik Saad, is a digital health platform for chronic medicines support and patient assistance programs.
